creator: klaus.herrmann@goelz.com
text:
Under "normal" use, our server just crashed. The only message on the
 console said "page_error: out of swap". First all the Samba & Netatalk
services could not be reached, the the box didn't even response to "ping"
anymore.
btw, the server has 256MB RAM + 256MN SWAP

How-To-Repeat: don't know. fill up the swap?
